buildCommand: bun run --filter @ronin-dojo/web db:generate && bun run --filter @ronin-dojo/web build
_comment_deploy_unit: BBL (apps/web) Vercel project config — ADR 0034 per-product deploy unit. ignoreCommand returns 0 (=skip build) when NONE of these paths changed. Scoped to apps/web + the shared kernel apps/web transpiles (packages — a ui-kit change CAN break BBL, so it must trigger a rebuild) + root install/config. The trailing ':(exclude)*.md' ':(exclude)*.mdx' pathspecs strip markdown from the trigger set: package/app READMEs (packages/*/README.md, apps/web/scripts/fixtures/README.md) are NOT build inputs, so a docs-only edit to them must NOT deploy BBL (SESSION_0501 fixed this false-positive — verified both directions: docs-in-packages push -> skip, code push -> deploy). Safe because apps/web has NO MDX/content-collection build pipeline; if one is ever added, revisit the exclusion. NOT broadened to all apps/* on purpose: a sibling apps/baseline change must NOT rebuild BBL — apps/baseline is its OWN Vercel project with its own vercel.json scoped to 'apps/baseline packages bun.lock' (SESSION_0463 stands it up). CI for both: ci.yml/playwright.yml gate apps/web; clients-ci.yml (the "Products CI" workflow) gates apps/baseline + clients/*.
ignoreCommand: git diff --quiet HEAD^ HEAD -- apps/web packages bun.lock package.json vercel.json ':(exclude)*.md' ':(exclude)*.mdx'
